headline: ADM Ethics Recognition And Farm Partnership Shape Long Term Investor Narrative
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland (NYSE:ADM) has been named one of the World's Most Ethical Companies for another consecutive year. ADM announced a new partnership with American Farmland Trust focused on strengthening U.S. farm resilience. The collaboration aims to support American farmers during a period of heightened uncertainty and rising bankruptcy rates. For investors watching NYSE:ADM, this recognition and new partnership relate directly to the company's role as a major global agricultural and...
